overall.description: A first-person walk through a rain-soaked cyberpunk city district at dusk, featuring towering industrial buildings, neon advertisements, and elevated monorail tracks. The footage showcases the atmospheric streets of Night City from Cyberpunk 2077 with wet pavement reflections and sparse vehicle traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial street with elevated monorail track

events.description: large neon Buffalo's sign becomes visible on the right side of the street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the wet asphalt street through an industrial district with elevated tracks overhead

entered.detail: large multi-story industrial building with green metal facade and piping
curved elevated train track supported by massive concrete pillars
large circular neon sign with red and green lighting for Buffalo's restaurant
skyscraper with pink and white vertical neon lighting visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-soaked industrial street with a green metal warehouse complex on the left and elevated monorail tracks curving overhead on the right. As the camera walks forward, the large neon Buffalo's sign emerges on the right, glowing red and green against the gray dusk sky, while a tall tower with pink neon lighting becomes visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: street corner intersection with neon signage

events.description: beginning left turn at the intersection while approaching the corner
white sedan approaches from the left and enters the intersection

agents.ego_description: approaching the street corner and executing a left turn onto a new street

notable_agents.action: white sedan driving toward the intersection from the left side

entered.detail: white four-door sedan with headlights on approaching the intersection
weathered industrial building with metal scaffolding and pipes

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches a street corner with the Buffalo's sign now prominent on the right, then begins a left turn at the intersection. A white sedan approaches from the left and enters the intersection as the camera turns, revealing new industrial buildings on the right side of the new street while the monorail track shifts to the left side of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: city street with industrial buildings and steam vents

events.description: white sedan passes by from left to right across the field of view

agents.ego_description: continuing straight down the new street after the turn as traffic passes by

notable_agents.action: white sedan driving past from left to right at moderate speed

entered.detail: steam rising from ground vents in the middle of the street
green industrial dumpsters and trash bins on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Walking down the new street, the camera moves toward the Buffalo's sign which is now visible ahead on the right. Steam rises from street vents in the center of the road, and the white sedan passes by from left to right. Industrial buildings line the right side while trash containers and barricades appear near the sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza area under elevated highway

events.description: slight rightward drift while approaching the Buffalo's building entrance

agents.ego_description: walking toward the Buffalo's restaurant building with the monorail track visible overhead

entered.detail: tall art-deco style building with yellow and red geometric patterns
red and white striped construction barriers on the left sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the camera approaching the Buffalo's building from a new angle, with the elevated monorail track now curving overhead. The street opens into a wider plaza area with wet pavement reflecting the neon lights. A distinctive yellow building facade appears on the right while the camera moves past street barricades on the left, heading deeper into the industrial district.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement through a rain-soaked industrial district that shifts from a straight corridor into a wide urban intersection. It begins by walking along a wet street flanked by a green metal warehouse complex and curving monorail tracks overhead. As the camera advances, a glowing red and green Buffalo's neon sign emerges on the right while a distant tower with pink lighting pierces the gray dusk sky. The scene then transitions as the camera reaches the corner and executes a left turn, momentarily crossing paths with a white sedan entering the intersection. This turn reveals a new stretch of industrial buildings on the right as the monorail tracks shift toward the left side of the frame.

The shot follows a continuous first-person movement through a rain-soaked industrial street that gradually opens into a wide, neon-lit plaza. It begins by advancing down a narrow road where steam rises from central vents and a white sedan glides past, moving toward a Buffalo's sign visible on the right. As the camera passes industrial buildings and roadside barricades, the perspective shifts to reveal an elevated monorail track curving overhead. The scene then expands into a broader plaza area where the wet pavement begins to reflect vibrant neon lights, leading the viewer past a distinctive yellow building facade. Finally, the camera pushes deeper into the industrial district, moving beyond the remaining street barricades into the heart of the city.
